title: Configure Local Security Policy - Password Complexity
description: Enforce strong password policies: minimum length, complexity, expiration, and history.

implementation.linux: secpol.msc > Account Policies > Password Policy: Minimum password length 14; Complexity enabled; Max age 60 days; History 24

verification: Attempt to create weak password; system rejects it

title: Configure Account Lockout Policy
description: Lock accounts after failed login attempts to prevent brute force attacks.

implementation.linux: secpol.msc > Account Policies > Account Lockout Policy: lockout threshold 5; duration 15 minutes; reset counter 15 minutes

verification: 5 failed login attempts lock account; admin must unlock or wait 15 minutes

title: Enable and Configure Windows Defender
description: Ensure Windows Defender Antivirus and Firewall are enabled and up to date.

implementation.linux: Windows Security > Virus & threat protection > Manage settings > Real-time protection ON; Cloud-delivered protection ON; Automatic sample submission ON

verification: Get-MpComputerStatus shows RealTimeProtectionEnabled: True; AntiSpywareEnabled: True

title: Harden Windows Firewall Rules
description: Enable firewall on all profiles. Default deny inbound. Only allow necessary ports.

implementation.linux: wf.msc > Inbound rules: Block default. Allow only 80, 443, 3389 (if needed). Enable logging.

verification: netsh advfirewall show allprofiles shows Firewall Policy: BlockInbound,AllowOutbound for all profiles

title: Enable Comprehensive Audit Policy
description: Audit logon events, object access, policy changes, privilege use, and process tracking.

implementation.linux: secpol.msc > Advanced Audit Policy Configuration: Audit Logon, Object Access, Policy Change, Privilege Use, Account Management

verification: Event Viewer > Security shows events for failed logins, privilege escalations

title: Disable Unnecessary Services
description: Disable services not needed for web server role: Telnet, FTP, Print Spooler, Fax, Windows Search.

implementation.linux: services.msc: Stop and Disable Telnet, FTP, Print Spooler, Fax, Windows Search, Remote Registry

verification: Get-Service shows disabled/ stopped for listed services; netstat shows no listening on 21, 23

title: Configure PowerShell Execution Policy and Constrained Language Mode
description: Set execution policy to AllSigned or RemoteSigned. Enable constrained language mode if possible.

implementation.linux: Set-ExecutionPolicy AllSigned; Enable AppLocker/WDAC for constrained language mode

verification: Run untrusted .ps1 script; execution blocked or prompts for confirmation

title: Ensure AMSI Providers are Active
description: AntiMalware Scan Interface (AMSI) scans scripts and commands for malicious content.

implementation.linux: Windows Defender AMSI is enabled by default; verify no 3rd-party AMSI is disabled; check registry HKLM\Software\Microsoft\AMSI

verification: Running known AMSI test string triggers detection; Windows Defender shows alert

title: Enforce User Account Control (UAC)
description: Set UAC to highest level (Always notify) to prevent unauthorized privilege escalation.

implementation.linux: Regedit: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System > ConsentPromptBehaviorAdmin = 2; EnableLUA = 1

verification: Running admin-level command triggers UAC prompt; non-admin cannot bypass

title: Implement Application Whitelisting (AppLocker or WDAC)
description: Only allow approved applications and scripts to execute. Block unknown or untrusted code.

implementation.linux: Configure AppLocker with publisher/path/hash rules for web server processes; OR deploy WDAC policy

verification: Attempt to run unapproved executable or script; blocked by AppLocker/WDAC

title: Configure Windows Event Forwarding (WEF)
description: Forward critical security events to centralized collector for SIEM correlation and tamper protection.

implementation.linux: Group Policy: Computer Configuration > Administrative Templates > Windows Components > Event Forwarding > Configure target subscription manager

verification: Collector receives forwarded events from server; Event Viewer shows subscription status

title: Enable Hypervisor-protected Code Integrity (HVCI)
description: HVCI (Memory Integrity) prevents kernel-mode drivers and code from being injected by malware.

implementation.linux: Windows Security > Device security > Core isolation > Memory Integrity: ON

verification: msinfo32 > System Information > Device Security shows Memory Integrity: ON

title: Enable Windows Defender Credential Guard
description: Isolate credential storage using virtualization to prevent credential theft from LSASS.

implementation.linux: Group Policy: Computer Configuration > Administrative Templates > System > Device Guard > Turn on Virtualization Based Security > Enable; UEFI Lock

verification: msinfo32 shows Device Guard > Credential Guard: Running

title: Restrict Administrative Tools Access
description: Use Admin Approval Mode and restrict access to admin tools like Computer Management and Regedit.

implementation.linux: Group Policy: User Configuration > Administrative Templates > System > Prevent access to registry editing tools; similar for CMD and PowerShell for non-admins

verification: Non-admin user cannot open regedit or cmd; receives access denied message

title: Enable BitLocker Drive Encryption
description: Encrypt system and data drives with BitLocker to protect against physical theft.

implementation.linux: BitLocker Drive Encryption > Turn on BitLocker for OS and data drives; save recovery key to AD or secure location

verification: manage-bde -status shows Protection Status: On for required drives

title: Configure Schannel TLS/SSL Hardening
description: Disable SSL 2.0, SSL 3.0, TLS 1.0, TLS 1.1 via registry. Enable TLS 1.2 and 1.3 only.

implementation.linux: Registry: HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\SecurityProviders\SCHANNEL\Protocols\TLS 1.0\Client: DisabledByDefault = 1, Enabled = 0; Same for TLS 1.1, SSL 2.0, SSL 3.0

verification: SSL Labs test shows only TLS 1.2+; IISCrypto tool shows protocols disabled

title: Disable Internet Explorer Enhanced Security if Not Needed
description: For web servers, IE is not needed. Remove or harden IE settings if present.

implementation.linux: Server Manager > Local Server > IE Enhanced Security Configuration: Off for users and administrators

verification: Internet Explorer opens without security warning spam; ideally use Edge or no browser on server

title: Harden IIS Application Pool Identity
description: Use ApplicationPoolIdentity instead of NetworkService or LocalSystem to sandbox IIS processes.

implementation.linux: IIS Manager > Application Pools > site_pool > Advanced Settings > Identity: ApplicationPoolIdentity; assign unique pool per site

verification: Task Manager > Details > w3wp.exe runs under IIS APPPOOL\pool_name; cannot access other sites files

title: Secure and Restrict RDP Access
description: Use Network Level Authentication, require gateway, limit RDP to specific IPs, and enable certificate-based auth.

implementation.linux: System Properties > Remote > Allow connections only from computers running Remote Desktop with Network Level Authentication; Group Policy: Require TLS 1.2 for RDP

verification: RDP session requires certificate; connection from unauthorized IP blocked by firewall

title: Enable Automatic Windows Updates and Patching
description: Configure Windows Update to automatically install critical and security updates.

implementation.linux: Settings > Windows Update > Advanced options > Automatic: ON; Configure WSUS or Windows Update for Business if managed

verification: Windows Update history shows recent security patches installed; no critical CVEs unpatched >30 days
